name: @prune/pull-context
description: F3 — Negotiated Pull-Context. Flips context selection from push to pull: a manifest turn sends only signatures + stable symbol-ids, the model emits a FETCH request, and the host injects only the requested bodies. The killer risk (under-request → failed turn → expensive retry) is gated three deterministic ways: DAG-closure auto-include of a requested symbol's mandatory deps, a coverage-floor candidate for any omitted push-critical symbol, and a retry-economics gate that only pulls when the predicted manifest+fetch cost beats push by enough to absorb one re-fetch. Deterministic graph closure + arithmetic; the FETCH request is caller-fed; no model call, no regex.
